Motion To Seal Portions Of The Complaint And Certain Exhibits Thereto
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM
RICHARD H. ZELICHOV, Esq., DLA PIPER LLP 310.595.3000 richard.zelichov@us.dlapiper.com Attorney for Defendant STRATASYS, INC.
No other appearances

Cousel for defendant appears out of an abundance of caution. No argument is held.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STRATASYS, INC.'s Motion To Seal Portions Of The Complaint And Certain Exhibits Thereto.

Stratasys, Inc.'s unopposed motion to seal portions of complaint and certain exhibits thereto is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY , IN ITS CAPACITY AS SHAREHOLDERS OF ORIGIN LABORATORIES, INC. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2- PLAINTIFF FORTIS ADVISORS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY , IN ITS CAPACITY AS SHAREHOLDERS OF ORIGIN LABORATORIES, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Lily Kim's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
